title: Proclamation No. 246, s. 1938
text:
PROCLAMATION NO. 246

RESERVING FOR PUBLIC FISHPOND PURPOSES TWO PARCELS OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE BARRIOS OF LOÑGOS AND BANKULASI, MUNICIPALITIES OF MALABON AND NAVOTAS, PROVINCE OF RIZAL, ISLAND OF LUZON.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce are pursuant to the provisions of section eighty-three of Commonwealth Act Numbered One hundred and forty-one, I hereby withdraw from sale or settlement and reserve for public fishpond purposed, under the administration of the Director of Science, subject to private rights, if any there be, the following-described parcels of the public domain, situated in the barrios of Loñgos and Bankulasi, municipalities of Malabon and Navotas, Province of Rizal, Island of Luzon and particularly described in Bureau of Lands plan Ir-446, to wit:

Lot No. 1.—Beginning at a point marked 1 on Bureau of Lands plan Ir-446, N. 33° 18’ W. 1,064.02 m. from M.B.M. No. 50, Caloocan cadaster, thence S. 27° 20’ E. 189.00m. to point 2; S. 27° 20’ E. 199.00 m. to point 3; S. 27° 20’ E. 170.00 m. to point 4; S. 27° E. 170.00 m. to point 5; S. 62° 40’ W. 96.00 m. to point 6; N.27° 20’ W.170.00 m. to point 7; N. 27° 20’ W. 166.00 m. to point S. 62° 40’ W. 90.00 m. to point 9; N. 27° 20’ W. 120.49 m. to point 10; N. 48° 53’ E. 92.15 m. to point 11; N. 25° 04’ W. 89.99 m. to point 12; N. 25° 04’ W. 159.72 m to point 13; N. 62° 40’ E. 86.67 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area if 8.0624 hectares.

Points 1, 5, 6, 8, and 9, galvanized iron pipes; points 2, 3, 4, and 7, bamboo posts; points 10 and 13, intersections; points 11 and 12, old stakes.

Bounded on the northeast, by Dagatdagatan Lagoon; on the southeast, by Dagatdagatan Lagoon, on the southwest, by Dagatdagatan Lagoon and lot No. 2; and on the northwest by lot No. 2 and Dagatdagatan Lagoon.

Lot No. 2.—Beginning at a point marked 1 on Bureau of Lands plan Ir-446, N.42° 59’ W. 1,098.09 m. from M.B.M. No. 50, Caloocan cadaster, thence N. 62° 40’ E. 99.33 m. to point 2; S. 25° 04’ E. 159.72 m. to point 3; S. 25° 04’ E. 89.99 m. to point 4; S. 48° 53’ W. 92.15 m. to point 5; N. 27° 20’ W. 82.51 m, to point 6; N. 27° 20’ W. 189.00 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of 2.4540 hectares.

Point 1, galvanized iron pipe; points 2 and 5, intersections; points 3 and 4, old stakes; point 6, bamboo post.

Bounded on the northeast and southeast, by lot No. 1; and on the southwest and northwest , by Dagatdagatan Lagoon.

Bearings true. Declination, 0° 48’ E.

Points referred to are marked on Bureau of Lands plan Ir-446.

Surveyed: December 29, 1936.

Approved: June 25, 1937.

Note.—Lot No. 2 is a portion of Psu-97232 as surveyed for Jose Tecson and Domingo Tecson.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto, set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the City of Manila, this eleventh day of January, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and thirty-eight, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the third.

{SEAL}

President of the Philippines

By the President:

Secretary of the President
